description_long: This is a white ceramic cup filled with a cappuccino or latte, featuring intricate latte art in the form of a heart and leaf pattern on the surface of the foam. The cup is round with a smooth, glossy finish and is paired with a matching white saucer beneath it. A single, rounded handle is attached to the side of the cup, allowing for easy gripping. The saucer is flat and wide, providing stability and a surface to catch any spills. The cup's interior is filled with a light brown beverage, and the foam art is creamy white, contrasting with the coffee. There are no visible logos, text, or decorative patterns on the exterior of the cup or saucer.
description: A white ceramic cup with a handle, filled with a latte featuring heart-shaped foam art, sits on a matching saucer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle centered and the heart-shaped latte art clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle on the left, displaying the elongated leaf pattern of the latte art.
description_view_2: Rear view with no handle visible, focusing on the symmetrical latte art and the roundness of the cup.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle on the right, showing the latte art from a different angle.
